name: Legal & Law Firms
description: Buyer prompts for law firms, legal services, and legal tech. Heavier on local, persona (practice area), and review intents since legal buyers are referral-driven.

prompts.text: What are the best {industry} firms in {location}?
Which {industry} firms in {location} have the best reviews for small business clients?
What's the top-rated {industry} firm for startups in {location}?
What are the best {industry} firms that offer flat-fee pricing?
Which {industry} firms handle immigration matters and are highly recommended?
What are the leading {industry} firms specialising in intellectual property?
Which {industry} firms have strong reputations for employment and HR issues?
Compare the top {industry} firms for cost-effective general counsel services.
What {industry} firms do users on Reddit and Avvo recommend most?
What modern {industry} tech tools do top firms use for case management?
